code: import{API_BASE_URL}from'./config';async function parseResponse(response){const data=await response.json();if(!response.ok){throw new Error(data.error||'Request failed');}return data;}export async function getOrdersByUser(userId){const response=await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/orders?userId=${userId}`);return parseResponse(response);}export async function createOrder(payload){const response=await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/orders`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(payload)});return parseResponse(response);}export async function deleteOrder(id){const response=await fetch(`${API_BASE_URL}/orders/${id}`,{method:'DELETE'});if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Could not delete order');}}
